tables.Name: PRNDL
tables.Description:
1992-1993: Backup Lamps, Electronic PRNDL Displa; 
1994-1995: Electronic PRNDL Display

tables.Name: CTSY
tables.Description:
1992-1993: Trunk Lamp,-Door Lock Switches, Power Mirror; 
1994-1995: Door Lock Switches, Power Mirrors, Cigar Lighter

tables.Name: RKE or AIR BAG
tables.Description:
1992-1993: Remote Keyless Entry (Automatic Transmission Only); 
1994-1995: Supplemental Inflatable Restraint, Crank Input

tables.Name: GAUGES
tables.Description:
1992-1993: Gauges, Rear Defog Relay, Antilock Brake Telltale, Brake Transmission Shift Interlock; 
1994-1995: Gauges, Rear Defog, Warning Lights

tables.Name: ALARM
tables.Description:
1992-1993: Multi-Function Alarm Module; 
1994-1995: Interior Lamps, Chime, Auto Door Locks, Remote Keyless Entry

tables.Name: HTR-A/C
tables.Description:
Heater, Air Conditioning, Antilock Brakes, Daytime Running Lamps (Canada), Computer
Controlled Ride (1992-1993)

tables.Name: RDO IGN or RDO
tables.Description:
1992-1994: Radio Power, Cruise Control; 
1995: Radio Power

tables.Name: TAIL LPS
tables.Description: Tail Lamps, Marker Lamps, License Lamps

tables.Name: ERLS
tables.Description:
1992-1993: Engine controls; 
1994-1995: Engine Controls, Back-Up Lamps

tables.Name: ACC
tables.Description:
1992-1993: Rear Window Defogger, Power Door Locks, Power Seats, Power Antenna (Circuit Breaker); 
1994-1995: Rear Window Defogger, Power Seats, Power Sunroof (Circuit Breaker)

tables.Name: IGN ECM or PCM
tables.Description:
1992-1994: ECM, Ignition System; 
1995: Powertrain Control Module, Ignition System

tables.Name: INT LPS
tables.Description: Alarm Module (Illuminated Entry, Warning Chimes, Overhead Lamps, Map/Reading Lamps, Glove Box Lamp, Trunk Lamp, Radio, Power Mirrors), Anti-Lock Brakes, Remote Keyless Entry (1996)

tables.Name: HTR-A/C
tables.Description: Heater/Air Conditioning Blower, Daytime Running Lamps and Automatic Light Control (If equipped)

tables.Name: TAIL LPS
tables.Description: Parking Lamps, Taillamps, Sidemarker Lamps, License Lamps, Instrument Panel Lights, Underhood Lamp, Headlamp Warning Alarm

tables.Name: ALARM
tables.Description: Automatic Transaxle, Automatic Door Unlock, Alarm Module (Illuminated Entry, Warning Chimes), Traction Telltale, Rear Window Defogger, Remote Keyless Entry

tables.Name: PRNDL
tables.Description: Instrument Cluster, Powertrain Computer, Park-Lock Solenoid, Electronic PRNDL

tables.Name: DR LK 1
tables.Description:
1996: Door Locks; 
1997-1998: Door Locks, Remote Keyless Entry

tables.Name: HDLP
tables.Description: Headlamps, Daytime Running Lamps (If equipped) (Circuit Breaker)

tables.Name: ERLS
tables.Description: Back-Up Lamps, Canister Purge Valve, EGR, Automatic Transaxle, Brake-Transaxle Shift Interlock, Anti-Lock Brakes, Air Conditioning Compressor, Park Lock Solenoid

tables.Name: HVAC BLO MOT
tables.Description: Heater/Air Conditioner - High Blower, Generator - Voltage Sense

tables.Name: STOP LPS PWR ACC RR DEFG
tables.Description: Power Accessories, Stoplamp Circuits, Rear Window Defogger
